mapper.select: select id, product_id, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at from advisor_product_subscription where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into advisor_product_subscription (product_id, user_id, status, invest_amount, current_value) values (#{productId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{investAmount}, #{currentValue})
mapper.update: update advisor_product_subscription set status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update advisor_product_subscription set invest_amount = #{investAmount}, current_value = #{currentValue}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update advisor_product_subscription set status = 'CANCELLED', updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, product_id, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at from advisor_product_subscription where product_id = #{productId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by id asc
mapper.sql: s.id as subscriptionId, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, p.status as productStatus, s.status as status, s.invest_amount as investAmount, s.current_value as currentValue, nav.nav as latestNav, nav.cum_return as latestCumReturn, s.created_at as subscribedAt

from advisor_product_subscription s inner join advisor_product p on p.id = s.product_id left join ( select n1.product_id, n1.nav, n1.cum_return from advisor_product_nav n1 inner join ( select product_id, max(nav_date) as max_nav_date from advisor_product_nav group by product_id ) latest on latest.product_id = n1.product_id and latest.max_nav_date = n1.nav_date ) nav on nav.product_id = p.id where s.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
select
order by s.created_at desc, s.id desc

select
order by s.created_at asc, s.id asc
order by p.name asc, s.id desc
order by case p.status when 'OFFLINE' then 0 when 'REJECTED' then 1 when 'PENDING_REVIEW' then 2 when 'PUBLISHED' then 3 else 4 end asc, s.created_at desc, s.id desc
order by s.created_at desc, s.id desc
limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from advisor_product_subscription s inner join advisor_product p on p.id = s.product_id where p.creator_id = #{creatorId} and s.status = 'ACTIVE'

select count(1) from advisor_product_subscription s inner join advisor_product p on p.id = s.product_id where p.creator_id = #{creatorId} and s.status = 'ACTIVE' and s.created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval 7 day)
select count(1) from advisor_product_subscription where product_id = #{productId} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select p.id as productId, p.name as productName, count(s.id) as subscriberCount from advisor_product_subscription s inner join advisor_product p on p.id = s.product_id where s.status = 'ACTIVE' group by p.id, p.name order by subscriberCount desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update advisor_product_subscription set status = 'CANCELLED', updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
